resources.name: Booking SaaS API — full reference
resources.description: Request titles describe each call; URLs unchanged. Import into Insomnia or edit in-repo.

resources.name: Businesses & branches
resources.description: **Onboard** creates tenant + business + first admin (or owner). **Locations** need `businessId` from `GET /businesses` after login. Use **Arena** folder to add futsal/cricket/padel courts at a location.

body.text:
{
  "businessId": "{{ businessId }}",
  "branchName": "Main branch",
  "name": "Elite Sports Arena — Gulberg",
  "locationType": "arena",
  "facilityTypes": ["futsal", "cricket", "padel"],
  "addressLine": "Plot 12, Main Boulevard, Gulberg III",
  "details": "Parking: basement P1. Night entry via rear gate after 22:00.",
  "city": "Lahore",
  "area": "Gulberg",
  "country": "Pakistan",
  "latitude": 31.5204,
  "longitude": 74.3587,
  "phone": "+924211234567",
  "manager": "Venue Manager",
  "workingHours": {
    "monday": "06:00 - 23:30",
    "tuesday": "06:00 - 23:30",
    "wednesday": "06:00 - 23:30",
    "thursday": "06:00 - 23:30",
    "friday": "06:00 - 24:00",
    "saturday": "06:00 - 24:00",
    "sunday": "08:00 - 22:00"
  },
  "timezone": "Asia/Karachi",
  "currency": "PKR",
  "logo": "https://cdn.example.com/venues/elite-logo.png",
  "bannerImage": "https://cdn.example.com/venues/elite-banner.jpg",
  "gallery": [
    "https://cdn.example.com/venues/elite-1.jpg",
    "https://cdn.example.com/venues/elite-2.jpg"
  ],
  "status": "active",
  "location": {
    "country": "Pakistan",
    "city": "Lahore",
    "area": "Gulberg III",
    "addressLine": "Plot 12, Main Boulevard",
    "coordinates": { "lat": 31.5204, "lng": 74.3587 }
  },
  "contact": {
    "phone": "+924211234567",
    "manager": "Operations lead"
  },
  "settings": {
    "timezone": "Asia/Karachi",
    "currency": "PKR"
  }
}

resources.name: Public maps & venue discovery
resources.description: Public discovery for maps and venue screens; complements `GET /businesses/locations` (authenticated).

resources.name: Courts free in a time window
Booked intervals for one court on a date
Block or unblock a time slot (owner)
App shortcut: book futsal (tenant from venue, no header)
App shortcut: book cricket (tenant from venue, no header)
App shortcut: book padel (tenant from venue, no header)
Court inventory (futsal, cricket, padel)
resources.description: Bookable **facilities** (courts) at a `businessLocationId`. Requires **Bearer** token + **X-Tenant-Id**. Create location under **Businesses** first.

body.text:

  "businessLocationId": "{{ locationId }}",

  "futsalFormat": "5v5",

  "futsalGoalPostSize": "3m x 2m",
  "futsalLineMarkings": "permanent",
  "pricePerSlot": 5000,
  "peakPricing": { "weekdayEvening": 6000, "weekend": 7000 },
  "discountMembership": { "label": "Monthly pass", "percentOff": 10 },
  "slotDurationMinutes": 60,
  "bufferBetweenSlotsMinutes": 0,

  },

    "maxPlayers": 12,

    "cancellationPolicy": "Free cancel up to 3h before slot."
  }
}

resources.name: Gaming venues (discovery + setup)
resources.description: Gaming venues use `locationType: "gaming-zone"`. Tag stations with `facilityTypes` such as `gaming-pc`, `gaming-ps5` (see `GET /product-catalog` → `offerings["gaming-zone"]` uses short codes; persisted location tags use the `gaming-*` codes on `POST /businesses/locations`). Public map: `GET /public/venues/markers/gaming` (legacy `GET /getVenues/gaming`). Venue profile: `GET /public/venues/:locationId` (legacy `GET /getVenueDetails/:locationId`) (same payload as sports venues; `facilityList` only lists bookable arena courts—there is no gaming-station inventory REST API in this service yet).

body.text:
{
  "businessId": "{{ businessId }}",
  "branchName": "Flagship lounge",
  "name": "Downtown Gaming Zone",
  "locationType": "gaming-zone",
  "facilityTypes": ["gaming-pc", "gaming-ps5", "gaming-vr"],
  "addressLine": "Level 3, Tech Mall, 88 Main Boulevard",
  "details": "High-end rigs and PS5 pods. ID check at entrance.",
  "city": "Lahore",
  "area": "Gulberg",
  "country": "Pakistan",
  "latitude": 31.5189,
  "longitude": 74.35,
  "phone": "+923008887766",

  "workingHours": {
    "monday": "12:00 - 02:00",

    "country": "Pakistan",

resources.name: Tenant custom facility taxonomy
resources.description: Tenant-scoped **catalog** types (separate from arena courts). `code` must be unique per tenant.
